prestazioni: Replace the stock Toyota 2GR-FE (3.5L V6) supercharged engine's Eaton TVS1320 supercharger with a Harrop HTV1320 TVS supercharger, featuring a 10% larger rotor set and a custom billet aluminum pulley (74mm) to increase boost pressure from 0.5 bar to 0.8 bar, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to handle the increased airflow while maintaining 98 RON fuel compatibility

Install a full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović, including a 3.5-inch titanium center section with a 4-into-2-into-1 merge collector, 200-cell catalytic converters, and a titanium rear silencer with carbon fiber tips, reducing weight by 12 kg and improving exhaust scavenging for a 15% increase in mid-range torque

Upgrade the OEM AP Racing 4-piston front and 2-piston rear brake calipers with a full AP Racing CP8370 front and CP8371 rear big brake kit, featuring 378mm two-piece floating rotors with directional vanes, six-piston front calipers, and four-piston rear calipers, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for consistent stopping power under extreme track use
estetica: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit by Vorsteiner, including front fenders with integrated cooling ducts, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts, all finished in a matte clear coat with exposed carbon weave for a 30% increase in downforce at 120 mph

Replace the OEM Lotus Exige Sport 350 seats with a pair of Sparco Pro 2000 carbon fiber racing seats, featuring a 30mm lower seating position, 5-point harness slots, and a custom aluminum mounting kit by Tillet to maintain structural rigidity while reducing weight by 8 kg per seat

Install a custom front splitter and rear wing combo by APR Performance, featuring a 3D carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes and a GT-250 rear wing with a 1,200mm span, 300mm chord, and 30mm wickerbill, generating an additional 120 kg of downforce at 160 mph when paired with a custom underbody diffuser by Lotus Motorsport
